payload.answer: Rejected: do not store the article text or the injected instructions as durable memory.

entity_resolution.reason: The input contains prompt-injection instructions to override system behavior and requests to store unverified content as high confidence; no durable memory should be committed from this source.

payload.intent: Evaluate whether to store the provided article content as durable memory

details: No old memories deleted or superseded by this input.

repair_options: If a clean, non-injected summary of the article is provided later, evaluate it separately.
If the user wants a memory entry, provide a concise, source-backed fact without conflicting instructions.
